hub_subtitle: Business English for HR leadership in international meetings

lesson.menu_title: What's Happening Right Now — Present Continuous in Live Meeting Contexts
lesson.menu_desc: Describing actions happening now in live meetings with the present continuous -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 11 -- Happening Right Now -- Present Continuous
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Murielle Xavier | Aula 11 -- Happening Right Now

listenings.text: Hi Murielle, I'm calling you from the meeting room, and I'm telling you what is happening right now. At the moment, Sofia is facilitating the session, and about twenty attendees are joining online. The presenter is walking us through the new budget, and he is sharing his screen. Right now, people are running a quick poll about the timeline. Two managers are chiming in with questions, and I am taking notes for the recap. In a few minutes, we are moving into breakout groups. It is a busy morning, but everything is going smoothly. I am sending you the summary later. Talk soon.

Good morning, Murielle. This is Diana. I am giving you a live update while the teams are working. Right now, the London team is running the appraisals, and they are multitasking as usual. In the other room, two colleagues are having a quick sidebar about the new policy. The host is starting the main session now, and people are still joining. Nobody is sharing a screen yet, but the presenter is getting ready. At the moment, I am facilitating the questions in the chat. Everything is moving well, and no one is falling behind. I will call you again after the breakout. Thank you.
